title.en: The Pulsing Heart of the Emerald Deep

description.ko: 식물과 심해 생명체의 경계를 허무는, 살아 숨 쉬는 유기적 구조에 대한 정밀한 탐구.
description.en: A close-up exploration of a living, breathing organic structure that bridges the gap between flora and deep-sea life.

prompt: An ultra-macro cinematic masterpiece of AURA-7, depicting a spiraling, nautilus-like heart made of translucent #7FB069 emerald moss and #2D5A3D vascular membranes. The entity is suspended in a silent, #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid void, rhythmically pulsating as it exhales #FFE66D bioluminescent sap that flows like golden liquid silk. 8k resolution, rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh.
